Han skrev opp hva han hadde gjort, gikk til auditoriet og undersøkte for å se om det var en dobbelteksponering. Rett over hodet, der det var i ferd med å sette seg, var en stor ildsøyle som sirklet rundt og rundt.

text:
He said, "Brother Branham, in the … looking through the negative through the ultra-ray lights, and so forth, it looked like it was kind of a yellow, greenish looking fire, a milling, like this."
And I said, "That's just the way it is." And people there who seen it.
To my opinion, here's what I think it would be, while I read the Scriptures. First, I have the picture here; I want to show it to you. Mr. Kipperman sells them sometimes at the meeting. But when I found out that he was overcharging the people for it, I wouldn't let them sell it in the meetings. Because the picture wouldn't cost over thirty or forty cents, not over fifty at the most, and selling it for a dollar and a quarter is too much. So I… Can you see it back there?
text_no:
Han sa: "Bror Branham, når vi ser gjennom negativet med ultrafiolette lys, ser det ut som en slags gulgrønn ild, som virvler rundt."
Jeg svarte: "Det er akkurat slik det er." Og folk der som så det, er enige.
Etter min mening, og basert på min lesning av Skriften, er dette hva jeg tror det kan være. Først vil jeg vise dere bildet. Hr. Kipperman selger dem av og til på møtene. Men da jeg oppdaget at han overladet folk for det, nektet jeg å la ham selge det i møtene. Bildet koster ikke mer enn tretti eller førti øre, maksimalt femti, og å selge det for en dollar og en kvart er for mye. Så jeg… Kan dere se det der bak?

text: Now, at nighttime, when you see those things going on here, it's not me that does that; here is the One that does it. How many can see how far back, let's see your hand, way back. I will have my boy to take it to the stand back there. And in here also, if you'd like to read Mr. Lacy's write up, there it is. You can have a photostatic copy… A photostatic copy's in my book there, but they won't let us (the studios), won't let me print the picture in my book. They let me have the … this, for this is copyrighted. See on the back, and on here? And you couldn't touch it (See?), because it's copyrighted, and they've got it in Washington, DC. And one of them hangs in the Religious Hall of Art, in Washington, DC, as the first photograph that was ever taken of a supernatural Being.
text_no: Om natten, når du ser disse tingene skje her, er det ikke jeg som gjør det; her er Den som gjør det. Hvor mange kan se hvor langt tilbake? La meg se hendene deres, helt bakerst. Jeg vil be min sønn ta med kopien til standen der bak. Og her inne også, hvis du vil lese Mr. Lacys beskrivelse, er den her. Du kan få en fotostatisk kopi... En fotostatisk kopi finnes i min bok der, men studioene lar oss ikke trykke bildet i boken. De lar oss ha dette, fordi det er opphavsrettsbeskyttet. Se på baksiden og her? Du kunne ikke røre det (Se?), fordi det er opphavsrettsbeskyttet, og de har det i Washington, DC. Og ett av dem henger i Religious Hall of Art i Washington, DC, som det første fotografiet som noensinne er tatt av en overnaturlig Væren.

text:
You know what I think, friends? I think that here's where this is, in Exodus 13:21:
And the LORD went before them by day in a pillar of a cloud (a pillar of a cloud), to lead them the way; and by night in a pillar of fire, to give them light; to go by night and day:
He took not away the pillar of … cloud by day, nor the pillar of fire by night, from before the people.
And with a reverent, sincere heart, I believe that that's the same Angel of God that led Israel out of Egypt to the promised land in the natural, is leading us to the promised land today, in the spiritual. For "In My Father's house are many mansions: I will go and prepare a place for you." And I believe the Angel of the Lord is leading the church today, and it's the same Holy Spirit. And anyone knows the Angel of the covenant was Christ. And not… It isn't just to me, friend. I might be counted in with you, but that Angel of the Lord just doesn't … to me, it's to all of you. And He's here right now. He's right in the building. I feeled it right now, and know that the Angel… This same Angel that I'm speaking of here, isn't five feet from me right now. And when I meet you at the judgment bar, and this night is called into--to order, see if I haven't told you the truth. He's right in here now.
text_no:
Vet dere hva jeg tror, venner? Jeg tror dette står i 2. Mosebok 13:21:
«Og Herren gikk foran dem om dagen i en skystøtte for å lede dem på veien, og om natten i en ildstøtte for å gi dem lys, slik at de kunne dra både dag og natt. Han tok ikke vekk skystøtten om dagen, og heller ikke ildstøtten om natten, fra foran folket.»
Med et ærbødig og oppriktig hjerte, tror jeg at den samme Guds Engel som ledet Israel ut av Egypt til det lovede landet i det naturlige, leder oss til det lovede landet i dag, i det åndelige. For «I Min Fars hus er det mange rom: Jeg vil gå og forberede et sted for dere.» Jeg tror Herrens Engel leder menigheten i dag, og det er den samme Hellige Ånd. Enhver vet at pakten Engelen var Kristus. Og det er ikke bare for meg, venn. Jeg må kanskje regnes med dere, men Herrens Engel er her for oss alle. Han er her akkurat nå. Han er rett i bygningen. Jeg føler det nå og vet at Engelen... Denne samme Engelen jeg snakker om her, er ikke mer enn fem meter fra meg akkurat nå. Og når jeg møter dere ved domsbar, og denne natten blir kalt inn, vil dere se om jeg ikke har fortalt dere sannheten. Han er her akkurat nå.

text:
Now, if this was my last service that I ever have in all my life, my words are the truth. For I have not testified of myself; I have testified of Jesus Christ. And the world, the church world, who sees it, and sees its operation, knows and believes it's the truth. And now, the scientific world is without excuse. It's scientifically proven to the scientific world.
You said, "I didn't see nothing spread about…"
No, sir. They wouldn't let the Look, Life, and Times, or none of the papers have it. All of them wanted it, and they wouldn't let them have it. Said if they put it in the paper… You know a Jew. Not all of them, but some of them want money. Said they'll cut it out. They're expecting to sell it, and It's sure sold thousands times thousands, and thousands of them, everywhere. And so I have nothing to do with it.
text_no:
Hvis dette var den siste gangen jeg noensinne holdt en tale i hele mitt liv, er mine ord sanne. For jeg har ikke vitnet om meg selv; jeg har vitnet om Jesus Kristus. Og verden, menighetens verden, som ser det og ser dens virke, vet og tror at det er sannheten. Nå er også den vitenskapelige verden uten unnskyldning. Det er vitenskapelig bevist for den vitenskapelige verden.
Du sa, "Jeg så ingenting spre seg om dette...”
Nei, sir. De ville ikke la Look, Life, og Times, eller noen av avisene ha det. Alle ønsket det, men de ville ikke la dem få det. De sa at hvis de trykket det i avisen... Du vet hvordan noen jøder er. Ikke alle, men noen av dem vil ha penger. De sa de ville kutte det ut. De forventer å tjene på det, og det har utvilsomt solgt i tusenvis, og tusentalls, overalt. Så jeg har ingenting med det å gjøre.

text:
But only this one thing, that I'm happy tonight, to know that Jesus Christ, the Son of God, who's sovereign in Word and grace, has vindicated that I've told the truth. And I've told you the truth. It's up to you to believe it; that's all. God bless you is my prayer.
Sonny… Ma'am? [The lady says something to Brother Branham.] Let's say, "Praise the Lord." That's ri… Oh, God bless you, sister. Then you know what is the truth, don't you, sister? That is true.
Was there anybody else was there at Houston, when the picture was taken? A man standing right here was there when the pi… another one here, another one there, there, there. Let's say, "Praise the Lord." The Bible said, "In the mouth of two or more witnesses let every word be established." Is that right?
text_no:
Men én ting gleder meg i kveld: å vite at Jesus Kristus, Guds Sønn, som er suveren i Ord og nåde, har bekreftet at jeg har fortalt sannheten. Og jeg har fortalt dere sannheten. Det er opp til dere å tro det; det er alt. Gud velsigne dere, er min bønn. 
Sonny... Frue? [Damen sier noe til Bror Branham.] La oss si: "Pris Herren." Det er riktig... Å, Gud velsigne deg, søster. Da vet du hva som er sannheten, ikke sant, søster? Det stemmer.
Var det noen flere som var i Houston da bildet ble tatt? En mann som står akkurat her var der da bil... en til her, en annen der, der og der. La oss si: "Pris Herren." Bibelen sier: "På to eller tre vitners utsagn skal enhver sak stå fast." Er det riktig?

text:
Now, friends, while the little short visit is here at this place, let us all now just lay aside every little thought that we had, that was--maybe it was this, that, or the other. Let's just say, "Lord Jesus, we thank You so much." And for this little time while we're here in the city, may we just huddle together as a hen bringing forth her brood out of the rain. And may we all be sheltered by His love, that these wheelchairs, and these people with heart trouble, and cancer, and so forth, will live and not die. Will you do it?
Your faith is what operates the divine gift. So as I say, if I never appear again in public, and my life is took tonight by Almighty God, He, Himself, has vindicated it to the spiritual world, the believers, and also, to the unbelievers. How many believes that's true? Let's see your hands. God bless you. That's fine.
Now, I've took quite a bit of your time. And sonny, you come now, or get the picture, and they'll put it back there.
I'm sorry we don't have them to sell, but you wan… go to look at it, and read it, why that's perfectly all right. Let's bow our heads now.
text_no:
Nå, venner, mens vi har dette korte besøket her, la oss alle legge til side enhver tanke vi hadde, enten det var dette eller hintet. La oss bare si, "Herre Jesus, vi takker Deg så mye." Og mens vi er her i byen for denne korte tiden, la oss samles som en høne som beskytter sine kyllinger mot regnet. Må vi alle være skjermet av Hans kjærlighet, slik at disse rullestolene og menneskene med hjertesykdom, kreft og så videre, vil leve og ikke dø. Vil dere gjøre det?
Deres tro er det som aktiverer den guddommelige gaven. Så som jeg sier, hvis jeg aldri viser meg offentlig igjen, og mitt liv blir tatt i kveld av Den Allmektige Gud, har Han Selv bekreftet det for den åndelige verden, troende og også ikke-troende. Hvor mange tror det er sant? La meg se hendene deres. Gud velsigne dere. Det er fint.
Nå har jeg tatt en god del av deres tid. Du, sønn, kom nå, eller få bildet, og de vil sette det der.
Jeg beklager at vi ikke har dem til salgs, men hvis dere vil se på det og lese det, så er det helt i orden. La oss bøye våre hoder nå.

text:
O Father, I didn't mean to take all this time, Lord. When I go to talking about You, I just love You so much that I … my heart just burns in me. I think of Paul preaching all night, one night about You, and a boy fell out of the window and got killed; and Paul went and laid his body over him, for he knowed he was anointed. He knowed the Angel of God that stood by him out there that night on the stormy sea was with him, and the boys life returned to him. And he said, "You'll be all right," and he got all right.
I think of how Paul loved You. When they was building the scaffold to take his life, he said, "I've fought a good fight, I've finished the course, I've kept the faith: And henceforth there's laid up for me a crown that the Lord, the righteous judge, will give me at that day: not only me, but all that love His appearing."
text_no:
O Far, Jeg mente ikke å ta så mye tid, Herre. Når jeg begynner å snakke om Deg, elsker jeg Deg så mye at hjertet mitt brenner i meg. Jeg tenker på Paulus som forkynte hele natten om Deg, og en gutt falt ut av vinduet og døde; men Paulus la kroppen sin over ham, for han visste at han var salvet. Han visste at Guds Engel, som hadde stått med ham den natten på den stormfulle sjøen, var med ham, og guttens liv vendte tilbake til ham. Paulus sa, "Du vil bli bra," og det ble han.
Jeg tenker på hvor mye Paulus elsket Deg. Da de bygde skafottet for å ta hans liv, sa han, "Jeg har stridd den gode strid, jeg har fullendt løpet, jeg har bevart troen. Nå ligger det ferdig for meg en krone som Herren, den rettferdige dommer, vil gi meg på den dagen; ikke bare meg, men alle som har elsket Hans åpenbarelse."

text: Dear Father, I ask You tonight, in the mercies, that You will send grace upon this audience. Bless everyone, Lord. And, O holy God, Author of Life, and Giver of every good gift, I've tried to testify the best that I knowed how. And I thank You for Your picture here with us. I look at It, and my heart quivers, think, "Woe is me, the Angel of God has stood near." And You've confirmed Your Word now, practically around the world; thousands times thousands are rejoicing. The scientific world looks at It, they hush it; they don't want it to get any farther. So was it in Your day. But those who are hungering and thirsting for righteousness, they shall be filled. And those who are predestinated to see the kingdom of God shall see, "For no man can come to My Father, exce…" or "come to Me except My Father draw him." And Lord, there's those here who believe. And I pray Father, that You'll shut us together tonight in the bonds of the love of Christ, and may You stretch forth His holy hands to heal all over this building.
text_no: Kjære Far, jeg ber Deg i kveld, i Ditt barmhjertighet, om at Du vil sende nåde over dette publikum. Velsign alle, Herre. Og, O hellige Gud, Livets Opphav og Giver av enhver god gave, jeg har forsøkt å vitne så godt jeg kunne. Jeg takker Deg for Ditt bilde her sammen med oss. Jeg ser på Det, og hjertet mitt skjelver, og jeg tenker: "Ve meg, Guds Engel har stått nær." Og Du har bekreftet Ditt Ord nå, praktisk talt over hele verden; tusener på tusener jubler. Den vitenskapelige verden ser på Det, de fortier Det; de vil ikke at Det skal nå lenger. Slik var det også i Din tid. Men de som hungrer og tørster etter rettferdighet, skal bli mett. Og de som er forutbestemt til å se Guds rike, skal se, "For ingen kan komme til Meg uten at Min Far drar ham." Og Herre, her er de som tror. Jeg ber, Far, at Du vil knytte oss sammen i kveld i Kristi kjærlighets bånd, og at Du må strekke ut Hans hellige hender for å helbrede over hele dette bygget.

text: And may, when the evening is over, Almighty God, Author of life, and Giver of every gift, two more meetings to end up here in America before sailing the seas. And Lord, please hear the prayer of Your servant. If I've found favor with You, grant this to be a great night. The people has waited long in the hot building, but may tonight, something different happen. May the blind see, or the deaf hear, or may the lame walk tonight; may there be something great. And may the Holy Spirit stand near, call out sin, rebuke things that's unrighteous, to straighten up some poor person that they can believe.
text_no: Og når kvelden er over, må Den Allmektige Gud, Livets Opphav og Giver av alle gaver, velsigne disse to siste møtene her i Amerika før jeg seiler over havet. Herre, vær så snill og hør Din tjeners bønn. Hvis jeg har funnet nåde hos Deg, la denne kvelden bli ekstraordinær. Folket har ventet lenge i den varme bygningen, men la noe spesielt skje i kveld. Måtte de blinde få synet tilbake, de døve høre, eller de lamme gå; la det skje noe stort i kveld. Måtte Den Hellige Ånd være nær, avsløre synd, irettesette urettferdighet, og opplyse enhver stakkars person slik at de kan tro.

text:
And Lord, while You're working here, as I have testified, testify of me, Lord, will You, tonight? And may Your Spirit come, and vindicate that You're present. And may every person that sees You, and Your wonderful way here at the platform, moving out in the audience, and picking those up. Lord, may those tonight, setting out there that won't be in the prayer line, may they have great faith and look and say, "I believe that It's the truth."
Then Lord, heal them, and turn Your servant to them, and announce it to them, that they are healed. Grant it, Father. Will You hear my prayer, as I sincerely pray to You? In the name of Your beloved Child, Jesus. Amen.
text_no:
Herre, mens Du virker her, som jeg har vitnet om, vitne om meg, vil Du, i kveld? Måtte Din Ånd komme og stadfeste at Du er til stede. Og måtte hver person som ser Deg, og Din underfulle måte her på plattformen, bevege seg ut i forsamlingen og løfte dem opp. Herre, måtte de som ikke er i bønnekøen i kveld, ha stor tro og si: "Jeg tror at Det er sannheten."
Så, Herre, helbred dem, og vend Din tjener mot dem, og forkynd til dem at de er helbredet. Innvilg det, Far. Vil Du høre min bønn, som jeg oppriktig ber til Deg? I navnet til Din elskede Sønn, Jesus. Amen.

text:
[Brother Branham speaks to someone.] My boy said he give out prayer cards, D today. And let's start tonight… We started last night at 1, didn't we?
[Blank spot on tape.] … and I ask them to keep their head down. This cold spirit kept flowing in. And I felt where it was at, and I looked back in the audience, and a man setting there with his head up like that, and a bunch of people… I said, "Sir, would you put your head down?" He just laughed at me.
And I prayed again, and it wouldn't leave the baby, because He told me, "If you get the people to believe you…" And that showed they didn't believe, or they'd do what you ask them to do. So I said … tried again, and it wouldn't… I said, "Now remember, sir, see you to it, I'm not responsible."
text_no:
[Bror Branham snakker med noen.] Sønnen min sa at han delte ut bønnekort, D i dag. La oss starte i kveld… Vi startet i går kveld med nummer 1, ikke sant?
[Tomt område på lydbånd.] … og jeg ba dem å bøye hodet. Denne kalde ånden fortsatte å strømme inn. Jeg følte hvor den kom fra og så tilbake i salen. Der satt en mann med hodet oppe, sammen med en gruppe mennesker. Jeg sa, "Sir, kan du bøye hodet?" Han bare lo av meg.
Jeg ba igjen, og det ville ikke forlate babyen, fordi Han fortalte meg, "Hvis du får folk til å tro på deg..." Og det viste at de ikke trodde, ellers ville de gjøre som du ba dem. Så jeg prøvde igjen, og det ville ikke... Jeg sa, "Nå husk, sir, jeg er ikke ansvarlig."

text:
And I said, "Almighty God, don't let this poor, little, innocent baby suffer for the guilty." And it was in a fit right then, and I called to God to heal it. And when the spirit was rebuked, the little baby quietened down, and that man, and about… I forget how many people, every one of them took epileptic fits, and begin jumping all over the floor, screaming, slobbering, and everything. Far as I know, got epilepsy yet today.
I seen a man not long ago in Phoenix, Arizona (I suppose he's gone now), with cancer. He thought he knew everything. He said, "It's psychology."
A few nights it wasn't psychology when he rushed to his doctor with cramps. He pronounced him with cancer [unclear words] Be reverent. It's not playing church; the Lord Jesus is here. We American people are so heady, and high-minded, and haughty, till we think we know it all. We're living now upon the reputation of our forefathers.
text_no:
Jeg sa: "Allmektige Gud, la ikke denne stakkars, lille, uskyldige babyen lide for de skyldige." Den var i krampetrekninger akkurat da, og jeg kalte på Gud for å helbrede den. Da ånden ble refset, roet babyen seg ned, men mannen og flere andre… Jeg glemmer hvor mange, alle fikk epileptiske anfall, begynte å hoppe rundt på gulvet, skrek, siklet og alt mulig. Så vidt jeg vet, har de fortsatt epilepsi i dag.
Jeg så en mann for ikke lenge siden i Phoenix, Arizona (jeg antar han er borte nå), med kreft. Han trodde han visste alt. Han sa: "Det er psykologi."
Etter noen netter var det ikke psykologi da han hastet til legen med kramper. Legen fastslo at han hadde kreft [uklare ord]. Vær ærbødig. Dette er ikke lek; Herren Jesus er her. Vi amerikanere er så hovmodige og selvsikre at vi tror vi vet alt. Vi lever nå på våre forfedres rykte.

text:
When Israel got out of the will of God, they suffered for it, and we will too. So you be reverent, and remember that now.
All right. I trust that the Christians will understand. How many Christians is in here? Raise your hand. Believers in Christ, that's wonderful. My, I believe it's one hundred percent clear tonight. Wonderful! Do you believe that I've told you the truth? If you do, raise your hand. Well, God bless your hearts. I'll assure you, by the Holy Ghost that you'll see wonders and signs, if you mean that from the bottom of your heart. Course, it's such a coming, I'll assure you to wonders and signs of the Lord. All right, and the patients in coming, I've got a great group of them there, fifteen. Usually, they…I…they don't let me get to but just a few.
When I speak to the person, I just have to talk to them till I get a contact with them, more I talk to them, more I see. But when I see the person I think has got faith enough, I just lay hands on him. Now, get this close. If I feel the person…if the person comes up and I look at him, and I, maybe, see an operation or something or some kind of trouble. I say, "Say, you was to be operated on for a certain thing." Then that shakes him, all right, I lay hands on him, say, "God bless you, brother, or, sister," and let them go.
Now, Jesus said (now, if they would try to use their mental faculties…), Jesus said, "These signs shall follow them that believe." I've testified. The trouble, don't let it go over you, friend. Let it come into you. Know that He's here and everybody here knows that it's impossible…I--I'm…I just have to let…The Holy Spirit is the One Who does it. And you believe me now, and you be reverent and sometimes…
Look, when…Moses was given two signs, is that right? How many believes that? The Bible teaches that. And that was to vindicate to the people that God had sent him and his message was true. Is that right? He put his hand in his bosom and healed it with leprosy. Is that right? And made a stick to become a serpent, he did that one time before Israel and every one of them marched out. Is that right? Now, every time he met a Israelite, he didn't have to heal his hand with leprosy. He did it one time and that settled it.
60 Now, in the light of the Bible, in the light of--of Jesus Christ the same, yesterday, today, and forever, if I come making this statement and bring a person out of the audience there that I know nothing about and God will vindicate that I've told the truth (Whether He would, I do not know, that's up to Him.); but if it would, all the church ought to believe; every one of them raise up and claim their healing and walk out of the building a well person, claiming their healing. Is that right?
All right, everyone reverent. Come ahead, sir. Now, these people that are coming to this platform I--I do not know--know them. There might be some. Now, let me look down the line, first. No sir, I don't know any of them. Now, do you? You all don't know me, do you? Just, we're strangers, are we? All along here, we're strangers? All right.
Now, I want to ask you something. Now, this is from my heart. If you do not believe, if you do not believe then don't you come. And if the Holy Spirit is standing here to reveal to you what has been in your life and will tell you what will be in your life, if you doubt it, worse things than this will come up on you. Are you aware of that? What does the Bible say? "Go and…" what no more? [Congregation says, "Sin."--Ed.] What is sin? Unbelief. Is that right? How many knows that sin is "unbelief"? That's right. If God has vindicated Himself of being here, then you go and disbelieve what He's told you, well then, worse things will come upon you. See? "Go ye, and sin…" The Bible said, "He that believeth not is condemned already." Is that right? Sin is "unbelief."
All right, now, it may be just a little slow for two or three people because I do that so that I can get myself into the anointing of the Spirit to where I can see it. And I may have to talk just a little bit, so you all bear with me a little while. And when God heals anybody at the platform, I want you to--to also believe out there.
61 It just shook me a little bit. I looked around and seen somebody I know. An old man, one of the first that I ever seen in the realms of Pentecost and came to my house when I was just a--a little lad, and set in my room. And I've been always, for Pentecost, I wasn't critical, but I didn't understand that speaking in tongues before these things happened. And I still, we know that there is some of it make-believe, but behind it there's a genuine article.
And this man come to my room when I was just a boy preacher and set in there one day. And I come in and he went…he kind of jumped and threw his hands up and spoke in tongues. And he said, "Thus saith the Lord," speaking in tongues, said, "A great ministry lies before you that God will use you to shake the world." And the elderly brother, is setting right back there, is John Ryan. Stand up, Brother Ryan. There. He was the brother from up in Michigan who came and spoke with tongues and stood and said that God had told him…I didn't know what to believe about the man. But my dear brother, our embrace from this platform to you, your words were true as you spoke with tongues. God be with you, now.
I just happened to look around and recognize him. Been quite awhile since I saw him. God bless you, brother. All right.
62 Now, my dear brother, you are the patient, I presume, that's come to be prayed for. Now, I will probably have to talk to you just a little bit. Brother Baxter, watch the microphones or wherever they are. Now, you and I are strangers of life. We're just passing through this land and some day, knowing that we are going somewhere else; and our determination, or, our--our destination, rather, will be determined by our faith in Jesus Christ. That's right.
Now, if you and I be strangers of life, and there's something wrong with you or--or whatever is wrong, God is able at this time to reveal to me what your conditions are. You believe that? Yes, sir. And now, you firmly believe that what I have said about the Angel of the Lord is the truth. Do you, sir? Have you ever seen this picture? You've never seen it. I'd just like to show it to you while we're standing here so that you could…You believe that that milling whirling Fire is the Angel of the Lord? Yes, sir.
And you realize that something's taking place even now, isn't it, sir? You're--you're beginning to feel a strange feeling, a lovely, warm feeling. Is that right? If it is, raise your hand so the people…That is right, and us, being strangers…
63 Now, that same Spirit was upon Jesus when Nathanael came to Him one time and when Jesus saw him coming, He said, "Behold, an Israelite, indeed, in whom there is no guile." In other words, I'd say, like you are, a Christian man. See? All right.
And he looked around, said, "Well, when did you know me, Rabbi?"
Well, you…somebody might say, in the audience, it's just as strange to say, "Why sure, we believe the man's a Christian. He wouldn't be up there." Jesus could've said he was a believer or he wouldn't have come to Him. See? But, He knew he was a--a believer.
He said, "When did You know me?"
He said, "Before Philip called you I saw you." That's right. And He said, "These things that I do, shall ye also and greater," otherwise, "more than this shall you do for I go to my Father." Is that true? All right, now, you can put your hand down that you are aware there's something going on.
64 Now, what it is, is you and I speaking and there's something wrong with you and there's Something in here that you…I feel it and you feel it. It's come in contact, therefore, there's a warfare between your ailment and between this Spirit, you see. And if your spirit can come up to believe this, God will bless you and you'd get well. Yes, sir. You're--you're a believer. I believe that with all my heart. Yes, sir. You--you haven't always been a believer, though. No. You've--you've been a critic. You criticized this, haven't you? Isn't that right? Yes, sir. You criticized. I believe it was probably my meeting. I see you shaking your head. [The brother asks forgiveness--Ed.] You're forgiven, my brother, you are. Yes, sir. Yes, sir. Yes, sir. God bless you.
Say, you're quite a sportsman of some kind. Don't you hunt or something like that? Yes, sir. Yes, sir. I see you with a gun and hunting. That's right. And you're quite…say, wasn't you once a policeman or something? Yeah. Wasn't you on a police force or…Yes, sir. You have…I see it. And you're suffering with your throat. Isn't that right, brother? It's been a nerve condition of your throat for a many years. Is that right? Come here, my brother.
Merciful God, Author of Life and Giver of all good gifts, may Thy blessings come upon my brother and may he go from here a well man and serve Thee all the days of his life, dear Father, in the Name of Thy Son, Jesus Christ. Amen.
God bless you, brother. Go rejoicing now. You're going to be well. God bless you. That's all right, just believe Him. Amen. Humble brother: when I seen I thought it was a service and I seen him talking to a thin man with a gray suit on saying, "Nothing to it. Nothing to it." I could hear his voice saying that. And when it was called to the platform, he grabbed my hand and said, "Forgive me, brother." You can't trifle with God, brother. He knows all things and He'll…He rightens all wrongs. Oh, don't you love Him? How could you keep from loving Him? The lovely One. All right. All right. Be reverent. And bring the brother on.
65 How do you do, brother? God bless you. God be with you, brother. I hope everyone comes like this. Look here just a minute, Dad. You and I are strangers of life. We don't know each other no more than we're meeting now, but you truly believe that I've told the truth. Don't you, brother? Yes, sir.
And now, you're suffering with something wrong in your liver. Isn't that right? It's bothered you for a long time. Isn't that right? And I see you in a place…you're from away from here. You're a stranger. You're not from this city, are you? No, you've come a long ways, some distance. And you're from a--a country that's got a lot of lakes in it. Aren't you? Isn't that right? I see…and you…you're a poor man. You're happy tonight. And you just was made happy a few moments ago when your number was called. Isn't that right? You had to leave tomorrow because you're out of money. Is that right, Dad? God bless you. Come here.
Heavenly Father, I pray Thee to be merciful to my brother. And O God, seeing the doctor move that table out for that operation. Grant, Lord, that it won't have to be done. May my brother live and be well for I bless him in Thy Name, the Name of Jesus Christ. Amen.
God bless you, brother. Go, you're going to be all right, Dad. You're pending an operation. That's right. Doctor said they had to operate. Have faith in God then. Amen. God bless you.
Let's say, "Praise the Lord," everybody. Let's just say, "Praise be to God." The Bible said, "And the people magnified God, or, glorified God." He's here, the same Jesus, yesterday, today, and forever.
66 Come, sister. Do you believe with all your heart? Now that the…you might think it was looking at the people. The reason that I tell them to look at me is because I say this, it's not…I'm not looking at them to read their mind. Well, them people probably things that was told them…I know there was a vision before them, why they--they probably forgot those things years ago, whatever was told. I seen both of them from way years ago and they wasn't thinking of that. It's the power of Almighty God. Amen. The word amen means "so be it." And this woman here, I don't look at her. I don't have to look…sister, walk up just a little close.
Do you believe me as God's servant? You do. Can God reveal to me out here what's wrong with you? You believe He can? And will you, if I, by the Spirit of God, will be able to tell you what is wrong with you, will you accept Jesus as your Healer? You will accept Him? All right. May God grant it to us tonight is my prayer. Yes, ma'am. You are diabetic. Is that right? Go and the Lord Jesus Christ make you well in His Name.
Let's say, "Praise the Lord." All right. Let's say, "Praise the Lord," everyone. Blessed be the Name of the Lord. The man is just rejoicing as…
67 All right. Bring the lady. Believe with all your heart. God will make you well. What do you think, sister, the patient standing here? Do you believe, lady, that Jesus Christ, the Son of God, is here at the building tonight? With all your heart? I say, you believe with all your heart? With all your heart. All right. I want you to love Him with all your heart and believe. Now, if by the Spirit of God, the Holy Spirit, through the Angel of God which is close now that will speak to me what is your trouble, will you accept Him as your Healer? Your female trouble just left you, sister. You can walk off the platform and be well in the Name of the Lord. Amen. Now, you may go and be well, little mother. God be with you. God bless you.
Let's say, "Praise be to the Lord Jesus," then. So, everyone just…
68 All right. Come ahead, lady. How do you do, sister? I must talk to you just a moment. Now, that won't hurt you. See? That's the Angel of the…Come here just a moment. I want to show you something. Did you ever see this picture? I want you, looky here at the picture. See the Angel of the Lord? See that licking Fire? Now, you feel something strange, don't you? That's what that is now. See. Now, that's to help you, sister. I'm just His servant. I am a servant of Jesus Christ.
Now, Jesus knew just where Nathanael had been. He knew what was wrong with the woman, but He talked to her first. In one place He said…Peter and John passing through the gate called Beautiful, they seen a man crippled from his mother's womb. He said, "Look on us." Is that right? In other words, look at us and the man looked, expecting to receive some money. He said, "Silver and gold have I none, but such as I have give I thee, in the Name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth, stand up and walk." And the man was weak and he held him up; held him till his ankle bones received strength. Then the man started walking, then he started jumping and praising God. And the man was an aged man, about forty years old, that this miracle was performed on.
I'm just trying to quieten you to see…See what I mean? That's Scripture, isn't it? Is it the truth? Is Christ the same yesterday, today and forever? You believe it?
69 Sister, you've been misjudged by many people. Isn't that right? You've been told to get next to yourself. Isn't that right? Claimed that you was a neurotic, psychic neurotic, a nervous condition. Isn't that right? It caused you to have weariness, and nervousness, and always upset, mentally disturbed all the time. Isn't that right? Now I see something else: I see a--a table with someone…you're refusing food. You have a stomach trouble, too, don't you? Isn't that right? Just certain foods and things you can eat. Isn't that right? Something happened then, didn't it? Your faith healed you, sister. Go home and eat what you want to. You're well.
Let's say, "Praise be to the Lord Jesus Christ, all of His Holy Being, may God be blessed."
70 All right, come now and everyone be reverent, believing with all your heart that He's here to bless and to help the people.
Good evening, sister. I perceive that you're a Christian woman. You have a welcome feeling. I believe you believe me as God's servant. Have you ever seen that picture of the Angel of the Lord? You have seen it. Uh-huh. What do you think about that? You do. Yes, ma'am.
Oh, there's…you have many things wrong. You…you're nervous, also. That's been for quite a while. A disturbance was caused back about the time of the menopause set in. Wasn't that right? You haven't felt right since then, have you? No. Now, it le-…yeah, here it is again. Yes, you're--you're a victim of arthritis, aren't you? That's right. I see you getting up, trying to get out of a bed and stiff at morning. Isn't that right?
You believe me as His prophet? You believe what He said is the truth when He said, "If they lay hands on the sick, they shall recover?" Then in the Name of the Lord Jesus, may the arthritis leave you, and all the weariness, and be well. Amen. Raise up your hands and walk off the platform just normal as you ever did. Go right…
Let's say, "Thank the Lord," with all of our hearts.
71 All right. Come, lady. Look this way as you come. Do you believe with all your heart? You believe the Holy Spirit is here to reveal what is your trouble? You want me to put my hands on you, don't you? And the back trouble will leave you when you pass by. God bless you. You can go off the platform now rejoicing, saying, "Thank the Lord."
Let's say, "Blessed be the Lord." All right.
72 Now, let's see, maybe the lady setting there; maybe I could look at her from--from this distance out here. No. The lady's deaf. Come here.
Almighty God, Author of Life, Giver of every good gift, send Thy blessings upon this woman, who I bless in Thy Name. Oh, Jesus of Nazareth, lovely One, incarnate Son of God, Thou Who was here and laid hands upon the deaf and they received their hearing. God, this woman, deaf, unprivileged to hear. She cannot hear the instructions and know how to take a hold of faith. Therefore, Lord, hear the prayer of Your servant, and give me power of faith over this demon of deafness, as it is written in the Scriptures, "When the deaf spirit went out of the man, he could hear." And now, Lord, this demon has did this to this woman to cause her to walk before a vehicle shortly, now, to be killed. But Thou art here to redeem her, Lord, back and to give her her hearing. Therefore, help me, Lord, as I go in this channel of faith to challenge this deaf spirit.
Thou demon, I come in the Name, representative Name of Jesus Christ, Who won the victory over you and all your kind at the Calvary's cross. I claim a gift of Divine healing ministered to me by an Angel. You're exposed. You can't hold this woman any longer. I charge thee in the Name of Jesus Christ: Come out of the woman.
Hear me? You hear me, now? All right. You're healed and normal and well again. Say, "Praise the Lord." "I love Jesus."
Yes, ma'am. In the Name of the Lord God, for this miracle.
Let's say, "Praise be to God." No demon powers can stand before the infinite Son of God when His Name is brought into a challenge by faith. It does not and cannot fail. All right.
73 How do you do, sister? You believing? Trying to press yourself, now, aren't you? Yes, ma'am. You believe that He is near? Do you accept what that is that you feel saturating your innermost being, to be the Angel of the Lord? Have you seen His picture? Do you believe it with all your heart? You--you have…[Blank spot on tape--Ed.]…?…All right. God has rewarded you of your faith now. You go eat anything you want to and thank God. You had a peptic ulcer in the bottom of your stomach, which caused sourness, and burning, and so forth. Go off the platform and receive your healing, my sister, in the Name of the…?…[Blank spot on tape.]
74 Just before you bring your patient, just a moment. What about you out there without your prayer card? Do you believe what you heard? You believe what you see and what you feel to be the Spirit of God? It's kind of hard when you reach back into places. I know when Brother Baxter walks in here, I know what that is. I'm conscience of one thing, that he thinks it's about enough now. I don't realize it. I--I get weak and then when I go out, I collapse. But I guess it's near the time. All right.
Go and believe sister, the heart trouble leaves you when you cross the platform. She was healed, setting there. ?
text_no:
Når Israel kom ut av Guds vilje, led de for det, og det vil vi også gjøre. Så vær ærbødig og husk det nå.
Greit. Jeg stoler på at de kristne vil forstå. Hvor mange kristne er her inne? Løft hånden. Troende i Kristus, det er flott. Jeg tror det er hundre prosent tydelig i kveld. Fantastisk! Tror dere at jeg har fortalt dere sannheten? Hvis dere gjør det, løft hånden. Vel, Gud velsigne hjertene deres. Jeg forsikrer dere, ved Den Hellige Ånd, at dere vil se under og tegn hvis dere mener det fra bunnen av hjertet. Kurs, det er en slik forventning, jeg forsikrer dere at dere vil se undre og tegn fra Herren. Greit, og pasientene som kommer, jeg har en stor gruppe der, femten. Vanligvis lar de meg bare få møte noen få.
Når jeg snakker med en person, må jeg bare snakke med dem til jeg får kontakt med dem. Jo mer jeg snakker med dem, jo mer ser jeg. Men når jeg ser at en person har nok tro, legger jeg bare hendene på ham. Nå, følg nøye med. Hvis jeg føler at personen kommer opp og jeg ser på ham, og jeg kanskje ser en operasjon eller noe slags problem. Jeg sier, "Du skulle opereres for en bestemt ting." Da rystes han, greit, jeg legger hendene på ham, sier, "Gud velsigne deg, bror eller søster," og lar dem gå.
Jesus sa (nå, hvis de ville bruke sine mentale evner...), Jesus sa, "Disse tegn skal følge dem som tror." Jeg har vitnet. Problemet, ikke la det gå over deg, venn. La det komme inn i deg. Vet at Han er her, og alle her vet at det er umulig... Jeg--jeg må bare la... Den Hellige Ånd er Den som gjør det. Og tro meg nå, og vær ærbødig noen ganger...
Se, da... Moses ble gitt to tegn, er det rett? Hvor mange tror det? Bibelen lærer det. Og det var å bekrefte for folket at Gud hadde sendt ham og at hans budskap var sant. Er det rett? Han la hånden sin i brystet og helbredet den med spedalskhet. Er det rett? Og fikk en stav til å bli en slange. Han gjorde det én gang før Israel, og hver og en av dem marsjerte ut. Er det rett? Nå, hver gang han møtte en israeler, trengte han ikke å helbrede hånden sin med spedalskhet. Han gjorde det én gang, og det avgjorde det.
I lys av Bibelen, i lys av Jesus Kristus den samme, i går, i dag og for alltid, hvis jeg kommer med denne uttalelsen og bringer en person ut av publikum der som jeg ikke vet noe om, og Gud bekrefter at jeg har fortalt sannheten (om Han vil, vet jeg ikke, det er opp til Ham); men om det gjør det, burde hele menigheten tro; hver og en av dem skulle reise seg og kreve sin helbredelse og gå ut av bygningen som en frisk person, kravende sin helbredelse. Er det rett?
Greit, alle vær ærbødige. Kom frem, sir. Nå, disse menneskene som kommer til denne plattformen, jeg--jeg kjenner dem ikke. Det kan være noen. Nå, la meg se ned linjen først. Nei, sir, jeg kjenner ingen av dem. Gjør dere? Dere kjenner ikke meg, gjør dere? Vi er alle fremmede, er vi? Hele tiden her, er vi fremmede? Greit.
Nå, jeg vil spørre dere om noe. Nå, dette er fra mitt hjerte. Hvis du ikke tror, hvis du ikke tror, så ikke kom. Og hvis Den Hellige Ånd står her for å avsløre for deg hva som har vært i ditt liv og vil fortelle deg hva som vil være i ditt liv, hvis du tviler på det, vil verre ting enn dette komme over deg. Er du klar over det? Hva sier Bibelen? "Gå og..." hva mer? [Menigheten sier, "Synd."--Red.] Hva er synd? Vantro. Er det rett? Hvor mange vet at synd er "vantro"? Det er riktig. Hvis Gud har bekreftet Seg selv ved å være her, og så går du og ikke tror hva Han har fortalt deg, vel, da vil verre ting komme over deg. Ser du? "Gå og synd ikke mer…" Bibelen sa, "Den som ikke tror, er allerede dømt." Er det rett? Synd er "vantro."
Greit, nå, det kan gå litt tregt for to eller tre personer fordi jeg gjør dette så jeg kan komme inn i salvelsen av Ånden hvor jeg kan se det. Og jeg må kanskje snakke litt, så bær over med meg en stund. Og når Gud helbreder noen på plattformen, vil jeg at dere også skal tro der ute.
Det rystet meg litt. Jeg så meg rundt og så noen jeg kjenner. En gammel mann, en av de første jeg noen gang så i pinsebevegelsen, kom til huset mitt da jeg bare var en liten gutt, og satt på rommet mitt. Og jeg har alltid, for pinsebevegelsen, jeg var ikke kritisk, men jeg forsto ikke tungetale før disse tingene skjedde. Og jeg vet fortsatt at det er noen som later som, men bak det er det ekte artikkel.
Denne mannen kom til rommet mitt da jeg var en ung predikant og satt der en dag. Jeg kom inn og han hoppet litt og løftet hendene og talte i tunger. Og han sa, "Så sier Herren," talte i tunger, sa, "En stor tjeneste ligger foran deg, som Gud vil bruke deg til å ryste verden." Den eldre broren, som sitter rett der, er John Ryan. Stå opp, Bror Ryan. Der. Han var broren fra Michigan som kom og talte i tunger og sto og sa at Gud hadde fortalt ham… Jeg visste ikke hva jeg skulle tro om mannen. Men kjære bror, vår omfavnelse fra denne plattformen til deg, dine ord var sanne da du talte i tunger. Gud være med deg nå.
Jeg bare tilfeldigvis så meg rundt og gjenkjente ham. Det er lenge siden jeg så ham. Gud velsigne deg, bror. Greit.
Nå, kjære bror, du er pasienten, antar jeg, som er kommet for å bli bedt for. Nå, jeg vil nok måtte snakke med deg litt. Bror Baxter, se på mikrofonene eller hvor de er. Nå, du og jeg er fremmede i livet. Vi bare passerer gjennom dette landet og en dag, vet vi at vi skal et annet sted; og vår skjebne vil bli bestemt av vår tro på Jesus Kristus. Det er riktig.
Nå, hvis du og jeg er fremmede i livet, og det er noe galt med deg eller hva som enn er galt, Gud er i stand på dette tidspunktet til å åpenbare for meg hva dine forhold er. Tror du det? Ja, sir. Og nå, tror du fast på at det jeg har sagt om Herrens Engel er sant? Gjør du det, sir? Har du noen gang sett dette bildet? Du har aldri sett det. Jeg vil bare vise det til deg mens vi står her slik at du kunne…Du tror at den snurrende, virvlende Ilden er Herrens Engel? Ja, sir.
Og du skjønner at noe skjer akkurat nå, ikke sant, sir? Du begynner å føle en merkelig følelse, en nydelig, varm følelse. Er det riktig? Hvis det er, løft hånden slik at folk…Det er riktig, og vi er fremmede…
Nå, den samme Ånden var på Jesus da Natanael kom til Ham en gang, og da Jesus så ham komme, sa Han, "Se, en israelitt, i sannhet, i hvem det ikke er svik." Med andre ord, jeg ville si, slik som du er, en kristen mann. Ser du? Greit.
Og han så rundt, sa, "Vel, når kjente du meg, Rabbi?"
Vel, noen kunne kanskje si i publikum, det er like merkelig å si, "Selvfølgelig, vi tror mannen er en kristen. Han ville ikke vært der oppe." Jesus kunne ha sagt at han var en troende eller han ville ikke ha kommet til Ham. Ser du? Men Han visste at han var en troende.
Han sa, "Når kjente Du meg?"
Han sa, "Før Filip kalte deg så Jeg deg." Det er riktig. Og Han sa, "Disse ting som Jeg gjør, skal dere også gjøre, og større," med andre ord, "mer enn dette skal dere gjøre for Jeg går til Min Far." Er det sant? Greit, nå kan du ta ned hånden at du er klar over at det skjer noe.
Nå, hva det er, er at du og jeg snakker og det er noe galt med deg og det er Noe her inne som du… jeg føler det og du føler det. Det har kommet i kontakt, derfor er det en krig mellom ditt problem og mellom denne Ånden, ser du. Og hvis din ånd kan komme opp for å tro dette, vil Gud velsigne deg og du vil bli frisk. Ja, sir. Du er en troende. Jeg tror det med hele mitt hjerte. Ja, sir. Du har ikke alltid vært en troende, skjønt. Nei. Du har vært en kritiker. Du har kritisert dette, har du ikke? Er ikke det riktig? Ja, sir. Du har kritisert det. Jeg tror det var trolig mitt møte. Jeg ser deg riste på hodet. [Broren ber om tilgivelse—Red.] Du er tilgitt, min bror, du er det. Ja, sir. Ja, sir. Ja, sir. Gud velsigne deg.
Si, du er ganske sportslig på en eller annen måte. Jakter du ikke eller noe sånt? Ja, sir. Ja, sir. Jeg ser deg med en pistol og jakte. Det er riktig. Og du er ganske…si, var du ikke en gang en politimann eller noe? Ja. Var du ikke på en politistyrke eller…Ja, sir. Du har…jeg ser det. Og du lider av halsen din. Er ikke det riktig, bror? Det har vært en nerveforstyrrelse i halsen din i mange år. Er det riktig? Kom hit, min bror.
Barmhjertige Gud, Livets Forfatter og Giver av alle gode gaver, må Dine velsignelser komme over min bror, og må han gå herfra som en frisk mann og tjene Deg alle dagene i sitt liv, kjære Far, i Din Sønn, Jesus Kristus' Navn. Amen.
Gud velsigne deg, bror. Gå nå med glede. Du kommer til å bli frisk. Gud velsigne deg. Det er greit, bare tro Ham. Amen. Ydmyke bror: da jeg så, trodde jeg det var en tjeneste, og jeg så ham snakke med en tynn mann med en grå drakt på som sa, "Ingenting i det. Ingenting i det." Jeg kunne høre stemmen hans si det. Og når han ble kalt til plattformen, grep han hånden min og sa, "Tilgi meg, bror." Du kan ikke leke med Gud, bror. Han vet alle ting og Han vil…Han retter alle feil. Åh, elsker du Ham ikke? Hvordan kunne du unngå å elske Ham? Den vakre En. Greit. Greit. Vær ærbødig. Og bring broren inn.
Hvordan har du det, bror? Gud velsigne deg. Gud være med deg, bror. Jeg håper alle kommer slik. Se her et øyeblikk, Pappa. Du og jeg er fremmede i livet. Vi kjenner ikke hverandre mer enn vi møtes nå, men du tror virkelig at jeg har fortalt sannheten. Gjør du ikke, bror? Ja, sir.
Og nå, du lider av noe galt i leveren. Er ikke det riktig? Det har plaget deg lenge. Er ikke det riktig? Og jeg ser deg på et sted…du er fra et sted langt herfra. Du er en fremmed. Du er ikke fra denne byen, er du? Nei, du har kommet en lang vei, en viss avstand. Og du er fra et land som har mange innsjøer i seg. Er ikke det riktig? Jeg ser…og du…du er en fattig mann. Du er lykkelig i kveld. Og du ble akkurat glad for noen øyeblikk siden da nummeret ditt ble kalt. Er ikke det riktig? Du måtte reise i morgen fordi du er blakk. Er det riktig, Pappa? Gud velsigne deg. Kom hit.
Himmelske Far, jeg ber Deg være barmhjertig mot min bror. Og å Gud, så legen flytte bordet for den operasjonen. Gi, Herre, at det ikke må bli gjort. Må min bror leve og være frisk for jeg velsigner ham i Ditt Navn, Jesu Kristi Navn. Amen.
Gud velsigne deg, bror. Gå, du kommer til å være all right, Pappa. Du skal opereres. Det er riktig. Legen sa de måtte operere. Ha tro på Gud så. Amen. Gud velsigne deg.
La oss si, "Pris Herren," alle sammen. La oss bare si, "Ære være Gud." Bibelen sa, "Og folket forherliget Gud." Han er her, den samme Jesus, i går, i dag og for alltid.
Kom, søster. Tror du med hele ditt hjerte? Nå at du…du kan tenke det var ved å se på folk. Grunnen til at jeg sier dem å se på meg, er fordi jeg sier dette, det er ikke…jeg ser ikke på dem for å lese deres tanker. Vel, de folk trolig ting som ble fortalt dem…Jeg vet at det var en åpenbaring før dem, hvorfor de—de trolig glemte de tingene for lenge siden, hva som enn ble fortalt. Jeg så begge dem fra mange år siden og de tenkte ikke på det. Det er kraften av Den Allmektige Gud. Amen. Ord amen betyr "så vær det." Og denne kvinnen her, jeg ser ikke på henne. Jeg trenger ikke å se…søster, gå opp litt nærmere.
Tror du meg som Guds tjener? Gjør du det. Kan Gud åpenbare for meg her hva som er galt med deg? Tror du Han kan det? Og vil du, hvis jeg, av Guds Ånd, vil være i stand til å fortelle deg hva som er galt med deg, vil du akseptere Jesus som din Helbreder? Vil du akseptere Ham? Greit. Må Gud gi oss det i kveld er min bønn. Ja, frue. Du er diabetiker. Er ikke det riktig? Gå og må Herren Jesus Kristus gjøre deg frisk i Hans Navn.
La oss si, "Pris Herren." Greit. La oss si, "Pris Herren," alle sammen. Velsignet være Herrens Navn. Mannen er bare glad som…
Greit. La damen komme. Tro med hele ditt hjerte. Gud vil gjøre deg frisk. Hva tror du, søster, pasienten som står her? Tror du, dame, at Jesus Kristus, Guds Sønn, er i bygningen i kveld? Med hele ditt hjerte? Jeg sier, tror du med hele ditt hjerte? Med hele ditt hjerte. Greit. Jeg vil at du skal elske Ham med hele ditt hjerte og tro. Nå, hvis ved Guds Ånd, Den Hellige Ånd, gjennom Herrens Engel som er nær nå, vil snakke til meg hva som er ditt problem, vil du akseptere Ham som din Helbreder? Ditt kvinnelige problem har nettopp forlatt deg, søster. Du kan gå av plattformen og være frisk i Herrens Navn. Amen. Nå, du kan gå og være frisk, lille mor. Gud være med deg. Gud velsigne deg.
La oss si, "Pris være Herren Jesus," da. Så, alle bare…
Greit. Kom frem, dame. Hvordan har du det, søster? Jeg må snakke med deg et øyeblikk. Nå, det vil ikke skade deg. Ser du? Det er Herrens Engel…Kom hit et øyeblikk. Jeg vil vise deg noe. Har du noen gang sett dette bildet? Jeg vil at du skal se på bildet. Ser du Herrens Engel? Ser du den slikkende Ilden? Nå, du føler noe merkelig, gjør du ikke? Det er hva det er nå. Ser du? Nå, det er for å hjelpe deg, søster. Jeg er bare Hans tjener. Jeg er en tjener for Jesus Kristus.
Nå visste Jesus akkurat hvor Natanael hadde vært. Han visste hva som var galt med kvinnen, men Han snakket til henne først. Et sted sa Han…Peter og Johannes som gikk gjennom porten som kalles Fagre, de så en mann som var krøpling fra sin mors liv. Han sa, "Se på oss." Er det riktig? Med andre ord, se på oss og mannen så, forventende å motta noen penger. Han sa, "Sølv og gull har jeg ikke, men det jeg har gir jeg deg, i Jesu Kristi Nasarens Navn, stå opp og gå." Og mannen var svak og han holdt ham; holdt ham til ankelen hans mottok styrke. Da begynte mannen å gå, da begynte han å hoppe og prise Gud. Og mannen var en gammel mann, omtrent førti år, som denne mirakelen ble utført på.
Jeg prøver bare å berolige deg for å se…Ser du hva jeg mener? Det er Skriften, er det ikke? Er det sannheten? Er Kristus den samme i går, i dag og for alltid? Tror du det?
Søster, du har blitt feildømt av mange mennesker. Er det ikke rett? Du har blitt fortalt å ta deg sammen. Er det ikke rett? Påstått at du var nevrotisk, psykisk nevrotisk, en nervøs tilstand.
